WITH daily_specials AS (
SELECT p.id AS publication_id
FROM publication p INNER JOIN profile_relationship pr ON p.profile_id = pr.destination_profile_id 
INNER JOIN profile pp  ON pr.origin_profile_id = pp.id 
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM p.published_at) = 2025 AND pp.biography LIKE '%daily special%' OR pp.description LIKE '%daily special%'
ORDER BY ts_rank(pp.biography_lexemes, 'daily' || ':specials') DESC NULLS LAST
 LIMIT 10)
SELECT publication_id FROM daily_specials
LIMIT 10;
